The run before that won by 0.7 len at Taree Ctry Bm58 March 3 over 1600m in soft going defeating Mr Villa with 60kg at $5. Well placed to bounce back to form.

form.formComment: Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 12 at Armidale Bm66 on March 29 over 1900m, 1.5 len behind Visualise carrying 60.5kg at $3.70. The run before that second last of 8 at Taree Bm66 on March 10 over 2000m, on a slow track; 11 len behind Fighting Magnus carrying 57.5kg at $2.40. Has ability and always gives 100%.

form.formComment: Most recently tracked the speed and boxed on steadily second last of 7 at Gosford Bm64 on April 2 over 2100m, 5 len behind Aussie Nation carrying 58kg at $5. The race before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 3 len at Taree Cl1-Sw March 10 over 1600m on a rain affected track defeating Xtreme with 59kg at $2.60. Worth following up in this suitable contest.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months rolled along in front before being edged out 3rd of 10 at this track Ctry Bm58 on March 20 over 1400m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Olympian carrying 59.5kg at $5.50. Previously second-up 3rd of 12 at Narromine Ctry Mdn on September 22 over 1300m, on heavy track; 0.9 len behind Prince Of Prophets with 56.5kg at $3.20. Genuine three-year-old who won't be far off his best.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months got back early 6th of 10 at Newcastle Cl1 on March 31 over 1500m, 3 len behind Is It Spectacular carrying 56kg at $26. Previously second-up settled well back; won by a nose at Nowra Mdn-Sw November 17 over 1600m defeating Presumptuous Gal carrying 57.5kg at $2.60. Nicely in at the weights and can improve sharply.
